Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia." This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly documented, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit. The presence of this diagnosis suggests ongoing management or monitoring of the lipid disorder, which further supports the likelihood of it being recognized in future visits.
